old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.5","title":"Implement DAO Path Sequence groups","description":"Implement RFC 6550 Sections 9.2.1 and 9.4 in Rust RPL: maintain Path Sequence per owned target/transit relationship; increment on lifetime, no-Path, and parent-list changes; parse one-or-more Target options followed by one-or-more Transit options as ordered groups; use associated Path Sequence rather than DAOSequence for per-target freshness; atomically reject malformed/cyclic updates before mutation.","acceptance_criteria":"Literal RFC-shaped tests cover multiple targets/transits, malformed ordering, stale/fresh per-target Path Sequence, restart/bootstrap DAOSequence, parent changes, lifetime refresh, no-Path, cycle rejection before state mutation, and route rebuild; RPL tests/Clippy and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:25.894725Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:25.894725Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:26.025671Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented RFC-derived fixes with literal regression tests; combined gates pass 99 lichen-rpl tests, 143 lichen-node std tests, RPL all-feature Clippy, formatting, and repeated independent review cycles.
